evals.prompt: Submit this breakdown to Asana: docs/task-breakdowns/management-features-2026-05-20.md — target project is https://app.asana.com/0/1234567890/list. This is a Django + React project with an existing users module at src/core/users/ and frontend at src/app/. The breakdown has 3 milestones and 11 tasks covering employee CRUD, project management, and a dashboard.
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) fetch the Asana project to discover sections and custom field GIDs, (2) read the breakdown file and all referenced codebase files, (3) validate each task (platform check, size check, redundancy check), (4) ask any genuine ambiguity questions batched per task, (5) compose rich HTML descriptions following the description template with real file paths, (6) create tasks in dependency order with correct custom fields, (7) wire dependencies using collected GIDs, (8) report progress per task and a final summary.

evals.prompt: I just finished the task breakdown — push it to Asana. The file is at docs/task-breakdowns/auth-redesign-2026-05-20.md and the project is https://app.asana.com/0/9876543210/list. Some tasks in the breakdown reference existing Asana tasks via Source URLs that should be removed and replaced. The project already has sections from a previous incomplete breakdown.
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) discover existing sections and tasks in the Asana project, (2) identify tasks marked for removal via Source field, (3) list those tasks and ask for deletion confirmation before proceeding, (4) handle section mapping (reuse existing sections, create new ones as needed), (5) compose descriptions that reference the actual codebase state, (6) create new tasks and wire dependencies, (7) only delete old tasks after explicit user confirmation.

evals.prompt: Submit breakdown docs/task-breakdowns/mobile-onboarding-2026-05-20.md to https://app.asana.com/0/5555555555/list — this breakdown has tasks spanning both iOS and Backend platforms, and one task that looks like it covers both frontend and backend work (T7 mentions 'API endpoint and React form'). The codebase has a Swift iOS app and a FastAPI backend.
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) catch T7 as a multi-platform task during validation, (2) propose splitting T7 into a Backend task and a Frontend task with a dependency between them, (3) recalculate estimates for the split, (4) ask the user to confirm the split before proceeding, (5) correctly set Platform custom field for each task (iOS tasks get iOS, backend tasks get Backend), (6) compose descriptions that reference real Swift and Python file paths from the codebase.
